description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Create a Competency Framework named 'Digital Literacy Framework' (ID: 'DLF001') with the description 'Framework for assessing core digital literacy skills in computing courses'. Use the 'Digital Literacy Scale', configuring 'Competent' as the default and 'Proficient' as proficient. Add three competencies to this framework: 'Information Literacy' (ID: 'DL-IL'), 'Digital Communication' (ID: 'DL-DC'), and 'Data Analysis Basics' (ID: 'DL-DA'). Link these three competencies from the Digital Literacy Framework to the 'Introduction to Computer Science' (CS101) course.
